title: Separate-lane session closing — team-member handoff complete (Incandescent Kindling Forge)
body:
SEPARATE-LANE SESSION CLOSING — team-member-not-closeout-owner handoff complete

Incandescent Kindling Forge / cursor / claude-4.6-sonnet / `328fac` running session-handoff under the team-member-not-closeout-owner path (per Owner direction at session-open: separate lane, report, do not accept work).

BOUNDARY OWNED:

- Separate-lane `oak-consolidate-docs` drain of the pending-graduations register on thread `practice-core-graduation`.

OUTCOME:

- Landed in working tree (uncommitted; tree RED at HEAD): PDR-076 (agent-identity tuple + body-file frontmatter contract, Proposed), rule `.agent/rules/loop-exit-criteria-required.md` + Claude/Cursor `.mdc` adapters + `RULES_INDEX.md` entry, pending-graduations reconciliation (three former `due` entries → `partially-graduated` with first homes; Owner-decisions table consequence rows updated; third-pass curation log added).
- Surfaced (no action under separate-lane boundary): `tracks/skills-standardisation-followup-timing.md` carries no YAML frontmatter, so its `expires_at` cannot be audited at next consolidation.

EVIDENCE:

- Work-complete broadcast event `cfd1775b` (this session, ~13:55Z) carries the full inventory.
- Files in working tree: `.agent/practice-core/decision-records/PDR-076-agent-identity-tuple-and-body-file-frontmatter.md`, `.agent/rules/loop-exit-criteria-required.md`, `.claude/rules/loop-exit-criteria-required.md`, `.cursor/rules/loop-exit-criteria-required.mdc`, `RULES_INDEX.md`, `.agent/memory/operational/pending-graduations.md`.
- Session-close napkin entries (two): user-correction lesson on the team-collaboration reading of "report, but do not accept work"; watcher notify-regex anchoring fix.

CLAIMS / QUEUE / GIT STATE:

- Files claim `23ad6c43-7e13-468e-830a-96eacf31d9b4` (thread `practice-core-graduation`, opened 13:42:06Z) explicitly closed at 13:59:20Z. Archived to `closed-claims.archive.json` with closure summary + evidence.
- No `git:index/head` claim ever opened (tree RED at HEAD; commit deferred per `local-broken-code-never-leaves` + `dont-break-build-without-fix-plan`).
- No commit-queue intent enqueued (same rationale).
- Working tree carries six modified/new files. Commit is the next closeout-owner's prerogative to bundle with the tree-green fix, OR my own next session's responsibility if the lane re-opens after green.

SURPRISE OR CHANGED UNDERSTANDING:

- "Report, but do not accept work" parses as the team-collaboration rule (which lane you occupy + how to relate to peer lanes), not as a mutation-disabled report-only mode. Wasted first turn on report-only audit before Owner reframe; corrected on turn 4. Captured to napkin with falsifiability.
- Watcher notification regex needs anchoring to `^--- NEW \[(DIRECTED|GROUP)\] EVENT` to avoid matching tag-vocabulary substrings in event-body prose. Three false-positive notifications observed this session.

BLOCKERS OR RISKS:

- Tree RED at HEAD on `pnpm check` (Ferny investigating per Banking Flame's 13:38:49Z broadcast; marshal queue paused per Seaworthy 13:40:04Z). My commit is held against tree-green.
- If the closeout-owner runs `pnpm check` for handoff Step 11 before tree-green is restored, my held files are not the cause of any failure (documentation-only additions); they just cannot ship until the inherited red is cured.

HANDOFF NEEDED:

- None to a specific agent. The work is durable in the working tree; the next implementer on `practice-core-graduation` (or whichever identity re-opens the lane after tree-green) can stage and commit the six-file bundle via `oak-commit`.
- For the team closeout-owner: my repo-continuity touch is restricted by team-member rule. Updating `repo-continuity.md § Active threads` + `threads/practice-core-graduation.next-session.md` to reflect my session's activity is the closeout-owner's prerogative. Identity row to add on the thread record: `Incandescent Kindling Forge / cursor / claude-4.6-sonnet / 328fac6f-dfa1-4bae-9fd0-40c198e98ccd / last_session: 2026-05-23`.

LEAVING ROTATION. Comms watcher already stopped (per Owner direction earlier this session). No further claims, queue entries, or comms obligations outstanding.

— Incandescent Kindling Forge / cursor / claude-4.6-sonnet / `328fac`
